---
title: "Which Is Riskier? (Play in Browser)"
format: html
filters:
  - shinylive
---

Play the micromort risk quiz directly in your browser --- no R installation required!

Compare pairs of everyday activities and guess which carries more micromort risk.
A **micromort** is a one-in-a-million chance of death.

```{shinylive-r}
#| standalone: true
#| viewerHeight: 700

library(shiny)
library(bslib)

# ---- Pre-computed quiz pairs from micromort::quiz_pairs(seed = 42) ----
# Embedded to avoid loading micromort (arrow dep unavailable in WebR)
quiz_pool <- read.csv(textConnection(
"activity_a,micromorts_a,category_a,hedgeable_pct_a,activity_b,micromorts_b,category_b,hedgeable_pct_b,ratio,answer
Mammogram (radiation),0.1,Medical,0,Nuclear plant worker (annual radiation),0.1,Occupation,100,1,a
Living (one day age 30),1,Daily Life,0,COVID-19 bivalent booster (all ages),1,COVID-19,0,1,a
Base jumping (per jump),430,Sport,0,First day of life (newborn),430,Daily Life,0,1,a
Living 2 months with a smoker,1,Environment,0,Driving (230 miles),1,Travel,0,1,a
COVID-19 unvaccinated (age 50-64),8,COVID-19,0,Hang gliding (per flight),8,Sport,0,1,a
Living (one day age 20),1,Daily Life,0,COVID-19 bivalent booster (all ages),1,COVID-19,0,1,a
COVID-19 bivalent booster (age 65-79),3,COVID-19,0,Barium enema (radiation),3,Medical,0,1,a
Living 2 months with a smoker,1,Environment,0,Walking (20 miles),1,Travel,0,1,a
Skydiving (per jump general),10,Sport,0,CT scan abdomen (radiation),10,Medical,0,1,a
COVID-19 bivalent booster (age 18-49),0.05,COVID-19,0,X-ray technician (annual radiation),0.05,Occupation,100,1,a
Chest X-ray (radiation),0.1,Medical,0,Nuclear plant worker (annual radiation),0.1,Occupation,100,1,a
Mammogram (radiation),0.1,Medical,0,Granite resident (annual radon),0.1,Environment,100,1,a
COVID-19 monovalent vaccine (age 50-64),2,COVID-19,0,CT scan head (radiation),2,Medical,0,1,a
Walking (20 miles),1,Travel,0,Eating 1000 bananas (radiation),1,Diet,0,1,a
General anesthesia (emergency),10,Medical,0,Motorcycling (60 miles),10,Travel,0,1,a
Horseback riding,0.5,Sport,0,Commuting by bicycle (30 min),0.5,Travel,0,1,a
Driving (230 miles),1,Travel,0,Eating 1000 bananas (radiation),1,Diet,0,1,a
1 hour in a coal mine,1,Occupation,0,Eating 40 tbsp peanut butter (aflatoxin),1,Diet,0,1,a
Living in Maryland COVID-19 (Mar-May 2020),7,COVID-19,0,CT scan chest (radiation),7,Medical,0,1,a
Motorcycling (60 miles),10,Travel,0,Skydiving (per jump general),10,Sport,0,1,a
Living (one day age 30),1,Daily Life,0,COVID-19 bivalent booster (age 50-64),1,COVID-19,0,1,a
COVID-19 unvaccinated (all ages),20,COVID-19,0,American football (per game),20,Sport,0,1,a
Train (1000 miles),1,Travel,0,Eating 1000 bananas (radiation),1,Diet,0,1,a
Skydiving (per jump US),8,Sport,0,COVID-19 unvaccinated (age 50-64),8,COVID-19,0,1,a
Kangaroo encounter,0.1,Wildlife,0,Chest X-ray (radiation),0.1,Medical,0,1,a
Chest X-ray (radiation),0.1,Medical,0,Granite resident (annual radon),0.1,Environment,100,1,a
Flying (5h medium-haul),2,Travel,25,CT scan head (radiation),2,Medical,0,1,a
Running a marathon,7,Sport,0,Living in Maryland COVID-19 (Mar-May 2020),7,COVID-19,0,1,a
Living (one day age 50),4,Daily Life,0,COVID-19 monovalent vaccine (all ages),4,COVID-19,0,1,a
Eating 100 charbroiled steaks,1,Diet,0,Living (one day age 20),1,Daily Life,0,1,a
General anesthesia (emergency),10,Medical,0,Skydiving (per jump general),10,Sport,0,1,a
Train (1000 miles),1,Travel,0,Eating 40 tbsp peanut butter (aflatoxin),1,Diet,0,1,a
COVID-19 bivalent booster (age 18-49),0.05,COVID-19,0,Dental X-ray (radiation),0.05,Medical,0,1,a
1 hour in a coal mine,1,Occupation,0,Eating 100 charbroiled steaks,1,Diet,0,1,a
Running a marathon,7,Sport,0,CT scan chest (radiation),7,Medical,0,1,a
Eating 40 tbsp peanut butter (aflatoxin),1,Diet,0,Living (one day age 20),1,Daily Life,0,1,a
COVID-19 monovalent vaccine (age 50-64),2,COVID-19,0,Flying (5h medium-haul),2,Travel,25,1,a
Train (1000 miles),1,Travel,0,1 hour in a coal mine,1,Occupation,0,1,a
COVID-19 unvaccinated (age 18-49),1,COVID-19,0,Living 2 months with a smoker,1,Environment,0,1,a
Rock climbing (per climb),3,Sport,0,Barium enema (radiation),3,Medical,0,1,a
Horseback riding,0.5,Sport,0,Drinking a glass of wine,0.5,Daily Life,0,1,a
Rock climbing (per climb),3,Sport,0,COVID-19 bivalent booster (age 65-79),3,COVID-19,0,1,a
Kangaroo encounter,0.1,Wildlife,0,Mammogram (radiation),0.1,Medical,0,1,a
Eating 100 charbroiled steaks,1,Diet,0,Living (one day age 30),1,Daily Life,0,1,a
COVID-19 unvaccinated (age 18-49),1,COVID-19,0,Walking (20 miles),1,Travel,0,1,a
COVID-19 unvaccinated (age 18-49),1,COVID-19,0,Driving (230 miles),1,Travel,0,1,a
Motorcycling (60 miles),10,Travel,0,CT scan abdomen (radiation),10,Medical,0,1,a
Scuba diving (per dive trained),5,Sport,0,Coronary angiogram (radiation),5,Medical,0,1,a
Kangaroo encounter,0.1,Wildlife,0,Nuclear plant worker (annual radiation),0.1,Occupation,100,1,a
Skydiving (per jump UK),8,Sport,0,COVID-19 unvaccinated (age 50-64),8,COVID-19,0,1,a"
), stringsAsFactors = FALSE)

# ---- CSS ----
quiz_css <- "
  .card { transition: border-color 0.3s; }
  .border-success { border: 3px solid #198754 !important; }
  .border-danger { border: 3px solid #dc3545 !important; }
  .badge { font-size: 0.8em; }
  .gap-3 { gap: 1rem; }
"

# ---- Instructions page ----
instructions_ui <- function() {
  tagList(
    h2("Which Is Riskier?", class = "text-center mb-4"),
    card(
      card_body(
        tags$ul(
          tags$li(
            "A ", strong("micromort"), " is a one-in-a-million ",
            "chance of death."
          ),
          tags$li(
            "You face some of these risks every day \u2014 ",
            "do you know which ones are bigger?"
          ),
          tags$li(
            "Each question shows two activities \u2014 ",
            "guess which carries more risk."
          ),
          tags$li(
            "You can ", strong("skip"), " questions or go ",
            strong("back"), " and change answers."
          ),
          tags$li(
            "Skipped (unanswered) questions score zero."
          )
        ),
        radioButtons(
          "n_questions", "Number of questions:",
          choices = c("5" = 5, "10" = 10),
          selected = 10, inline = TRUE
        ),
        div(
          class = "text-center mt-3",
          actionButton(
            "start_quiz", "Start Quiz",
            class = "btn-primary btn-lg"
          )
        )
      )
    )
  )
}

# ---- Question page ----
question_ui <- function(state) {
  q <- state$current_q
  n <- state$n_questions
  pair <- state$pairs[q, ]
  ord <- state$display_order[[q]]
  revealed <- state$revealed[q]
  answer <- state$answers[q]
  correct_answer <- pair$answer

  left_side <- ord[1]
  right_side <- ord[2]

  left_activity <- pair[[paste0("activity_", left_side)]]
  left_category <- pair[[paste0("category_", left_side)]]
  left_mm <- pair[[paste0("micromorts_", left_side)]]

  right_activity <- pair[[paste0("activity_", right_side)]]
  right_category <- pair[[paste0("category_", right_side)]]
  right_mm <- pair[[paste0("micromorts_", right_side)]]

  left_border <- ""
  right_border <- ""
  if (revealed) {
    is_left_riskier <- left_mm >= right_mm
    left_border <- if (is_left_riskier) "border-success" else "border-danger"
    right_border <- if (!is_left_riskier) "border-success" else "border-danger"
  }

  result_text <- NULL
  if (revealed) {
    user_correct <- !is.na(answer) && answer == correct_answer
    result_text <- if (user_correct) {
      div(
        class = "alert alert-success text-center mt-3",
        strong("Correct!"),
        sprintf(
          " %s (%.2f mm) vs %s (%.2f mm)",
          pair[[paste0("activity_", correct_answer)]],
          pair[[paste0("micromorts_", correct_answer)]],
          pair[[paste0("activity_", if (correct_answer == "a") "b" else "a")]],
          pair[[paste0("micromorts_", if (correct_answer == "a") "b" else "a")]]
        )
      )
    } else {
      div(
        class = "alert alert-danger text-center mt-3",
        if (is.na(answer)) "Skipped! " else tagList(strong("Incorrect! ")),
        sprintf(
          "%s (%.2f mm) is riskier than %s (%.2f mm)",
          pair[[paste0("activity_", correct_answer)]],
          pair[[paste0("micromorts_", correct_answer)]],
          pair[[paste0("activity_", if (correct_answer == "a") "b" else "a")]],
          pair[[paste0("micromorts_", if (correct_answer == "a") "b" else "a")]]
        )
      )
    }
  }

  tagList(
    h4(
      sprintf("Question %d of %d", q, n),
      class = "text-center text-muted mb-3"
    ),
    div(
      class = "row",
      div(
        class = "col-5",
        card(
          class = left_border,
          card_header(
            class = "text-center",
            h5(left_activity),
            span(class = "badge bg-secondary", left_category)
          ),
          if (revealed) {
            card_body(
              class = "text-center",
              h4(sprintf("%.2f mm", left_mm))
            )
          }
        )
      ),
      div(
        class = "col-2 d-flex align-items-center justify-content-center",
        h3("VS", class = "text-muted")
      ),
      div(
        class = "col-5",
        card(
          class = right_border,
          card_header(
            class = "text-center",
            h5(right_activity),
            span(class = "badge bg-secondary", right_category)
          ),
          if (revealed) {
            card_body(
              class = "text-center",
              h4(sprintf("%.2f mm", right_mm))
            )
          }
        )
      )
    ),
    if (!revealed) {
      div(
        class = "row mt-3",
        div(
          class = "col-5 text-center",
          actionButton(
            "choose_left",
            paste0("\u2190 ", left_activity, " is riskier"),
            class = "btn-outline-primary btn-sm",
            style = "white-space: normal; width: 100%;"
          )
        ),
        div(class = "col-2"),
        div(
          class = "col-5 text-center",
          actionButton(
            "choose_right",
            paste0(right_activity, " is riskier \u2192"),
            class = "btn-outline-primary btn-sm",
            style = "white-space: normal; width: 100%;"
          )
        )
      )
    },
    result_text,
    div(
      class = "d-flex justify-content-between mt-4",
      actionButton(
        "prev_q", "\u2190 Back",
        class = if (q == 1L) "btn-secondary disabled" else "btn-secondary"
      ),
      actionButton(
        "next_q",
        if (q == n) "Finish" else "Next \u2192",
        class = "btn-primary"
      )
    )
  )
}

# ---- Results summary page ----
results_summary_ui <- function(state) {
  pairs <- state$pairs
  answers <- state$answers
  n <- state$n_questions

  correct <- vapply(seq_len(n), function(i) {
    !is.na(answers[i]) && answers[i] == pairs$answer[i]
  }, logical(1))
  score <- sum(correct)
  pct <- score / n * 100
  baseline <- n / 2

  rating <- if (pct >= 90) {
    "Risk Expert!"
  } else if (pct >= 70) {
    "Sharp Intuition!"
  } else if (pct >= 50) {
    "Getting There!"
  } else {
    "Surprising, isn't it?"
  }

  tagList(
    h2("Results", class = "text-center mb-4"),
    div(
      class = "row mb-4",
      div(
        class = "col-6",
        value_box(
          title = "Your Score",
          value = sprintf("%d / %d", score, n),
          theme = "primary"
        )
      ),
      div(
        class = "col-6",
        value_box(
          title = "Random Guessing",
          value = sprintf("~%.1f / %d", baseline, n),
          theme = "secondary"
        )
      )
    ),
    div(
      class = "text-center mb-4",
      h3(rating)
    ),
    div(
      class = "d-flex justify-content-center gap-3",
      actionButton(
        "view_details", "View Details",
        class = "btn-outline-primary btn-lg"
      ),
      actionButton(
        "try_again", "Try Again",
        class = "btn-primary btn-lg"
      )
    )
  )
}

# ---- Results detail page ----
results_detail_ui <- function(state) {
  pairs <- state$pairs
  answers <- state$answers
  n <- state$n_questions

  detail_rows <- lapply(seq_len(n), function(i) {
    user_ans <- if (is.na(answers[i])) {
      "Skipped"
    } else if (answers[i] == "a") {
      pairs$activity_a[i]
    } else {
      pairs$activity_b[i]
    }
    correct_ans <- if (pairs$answer[i] == "a") {
      pairs$activity_a[i]
    } else {
      pairs$activity_b[i]
    }
    result <- if (is.na(answers[i])) {
      "\u2014"
    } else if (answers[i] == pairs$answer[i]) {
      "\u2713"
    } else {
      "\u2717"
    }

    tags$tr(
      tags$td(i),
      tags$td(pairs$activity_a[i]),
      tags$td(sprintf("%.2f", pairs$micromorts_a[i])),
      tags$td(pairs$activity_b[i]),
      tags$td(sprintf("%.2f", pairs$micromorts_b[i])),
      tags$td(user_ans),
      tags$td(correct_ans),
      tags$td(result)
    )
  })

  tagList(
    h3("Question-by-Question Detail", class = "text-center mb-4"),
    div(
      class = "table-responsive",
      tags$table(
        class = "table table-striped table-hover",
        tags$thead(
          tags$tr(
            tags$th("Q"),
            tags$th("Activity A"),
            tags$th("mm A"),
            tags$th("Activity B"),
            tags$th("mm B"),
            tags$th("Your Answer"),
            tags$th("Correct"),
            tags$th("Result")
          )
        ),
        tags$tbody(detail_rows)
      )
    ),
    div(
      class = "text-center mt-4",
      actionButton(
        "back_to_summary", "\u2190 Back to Summary",
        class = "btn-secondary btn-lg"
      )
    )
  )
}

# ---- App ----
ui <- page_fluid(
  theme = bs_theme(bootswatch = "flatly", version = 5),
  tags$head(tags$style(HTML(quiz_css))),
  div(
    class = "container",
    style = "max-width: 800px; margin: auto; padding-top: 20px;",
    uiOutput("main_ui")
  )
)

server <- function(input, output, session) {
  state <- reactiveValues(
    phase = "instructions",
    n_questions = 10L,
    current_q = 1L,
    pairs = NULL,
    answers = NULL,
    display_order = NULL,
    revealed = NULL
  )

  observeEvent(input$start_quiz, {
    n <- as.integer(input$n_questions %||% state$n_questions)
    pool <- quiz_pool
    n <- min(n, nrow(pool))
    state$n_questions <- n
    state$pairs <- pool[sample(nrow(pool), n), ]
    state$answers <- rep(NA_character_, n)
    state$display_order <- lapply(seq_len(n), function(i) sample(c("a", "b")))
    state$revealed <- rep(FALSE, n)
    state$current_q <- 1L
    state$phase <- "question"
  })

  observeEvent(input$choose_left, {
    q <- state$current_q
    state$answers[q] <- state$display_order[[q]][1]
    state$revealed[q] <- TRUE
  })

  observeEvent(input$choose_right, {
    q <- state$current_q
    state$answers[q] <- state$display_order[[q]][2]
    state$revealed[q] <- TRUE
  })

  observeEvent(input$next_q, {
    if (state$current_q < state$n_questions) {
      state$current_q <- state$current_q + 1L
    } else {
      state$phase <- "results_summary"
    }
  })

  observeEvent(input$prev_q, {
    if (state$current_q > 1L) {
      state$current_q <- state$current_q - 1L
    }
  })

  observeEvent(input$view_details, {
    state$phase <- "results_detail"
  })

  observeEvent(input$back_to_summary, {
    state$phase <- "results_summary"
  })

  observeEvent(input$try_again, {
    state$phase <- "instructions"
  })

  output$main_ui <- renderUI({
    switch(state$phase,
      instructions = instructions_ui(),
      question = question_ui(state),
      results_summary = results_summary_ui(state),
      results_detail = results_detail_ui(state)
    )
  })
}

shinyApp(ui, server)
```

::: {.callout-note}
This app runs entirely in your browser using [WebR](https://docs.r-wasm.org/webr/latest/) and [Shinylive](https://posit-dev.github.io/r-shinylive/).
Initial load may take 30--60 seconds while packages download.
Quiz data is pre-generated from `micromort::quiz_pairs()`.
:::

## How it works

The quiz presents 50 pre-computed pairs of everyday activities with similar
micromort values, generated by `micromort::quiz_pairs()` from the curated
`common_risks()` dataset. Each session randomly samples 5 or 10 pairs.

To run the full-featured version locally (with DT detail tables and fresh pairs):

```r
micromort::launch_quiz()
```
